MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-15-2004 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF CARRIE EDEN'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED FROM 10/18/04 TO 4/25/05 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT.
